dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses context-dependent direction based on trend. Entry conditions require price above/below 20-day MA plus ADX confirmation (>15 for trend strength) plus 1-3% pullback (represented as returns threshold). 'Higher highs/higher lows' pattern not directly available; ADX >15 serves as trend strength proxy. Exit on MA crossover with wide stops (3% vs typical 2%) to accommodate volatility per rule. News-driven pullback modeled as intraday return threshold.

'Higher highs/higher lows' pattern not directly available; ADX >15 serves as trend strength proxy. Exit on MA crossover with wide stops (3% vs typical 2%) to accommodate volatility per rule. source_rule_text: Do not trade against the fundamental and technical trend direction, regardless of news events or short-term price shocks, because structurally strong markets will not reverse on news alone.
